name: doctor-booking-system
description: his project is a backend system for booking doctor appointments where multiple doctors can manage their schedules. Users can check available time slots based on a doctor’s working hours and book appointments accordingly. The system ensures that no slot gets double-booked by handling availability and concurrency at the database level. It’s built using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with a focus on clean architecture and proper validation.
author: Alok Singh (https://github.com/aloksinghrcr65)
